SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class ReservoirToMarketOptimizer.OptimizationResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.ReservoirToMarketOptimizer.OptimizationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ReservoirToMarketOptimizer
public static class ReservoirToMarketOptimizer.OptimizationResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of a reservoir-to-market optimisation.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Constructor Details

    • OptimizationResult

      public OptimizationResult(boolean feasible, double objectiveValue, double fieldRate, double revenue, Map<String,Double> chokeSettings, Map<String,Double> wellRates, int evaluations)
      Creates an optimisation result.
      Parameters:
      feasible - whether the capacity constraint is satisfied
      objectiveValue - best objective value found
      fieldRate - field rate at the optimum in Sm3/day
      revenue - revenue at the optimum in currency per day
      chokeSettings - per-well choke openings (0..1)
      wellRates - per-well rate in Sm3/day
      evaluations - number of network solves performed

  • Method Details

    • isFeasible

      public boolean isFeasible()
      Returns whether the solution is feasible.
      Returns:
      true if within capacity

    • getObjectiveValue

      public double getObjectiveValue()
      Returns the objective value.
      Returns:
      objective value

    • getFieldRate

      public double getFieldRate()
      Returns the field rate at the optimum.
      Returns:
      field rate in Sm3/day

    • getRevenue

      public double getRevenue()
      Returns the revenue at the optimum.
      Returns:
      revenue in currency per day

    • getChokeSettings

      public Map<String,Double> getChokeSettings()
      Returns the per-well choke openings.
      Returns:
      map of well name to choke opening (0..1)

    • getWellRates

      public Map<String,Double> getWellRates()
      Returns the per-well rates.
      Returns:
      map of well name to rate in Sm3/day

    • getEvaluations

      public int getEvaluations()
      Returns the number of network evaluations performed.
      Returns:
      evaluation count

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Returns a schema-versioned JSON summary.
      Returns:
      JSON string

      Appends a string-double map as JSON key-values.
      Parameters:

      map - map to append

    • num

      private String num(double v)
      Formats a double for JSON.
      Parameters:
      v - value
      Returns:
